step_description: Table bloat and dead tuple analysis
narrative_hint: audit_log has 50% dead tuples — it has not been vacuumed in 4 days and is nearly half bloat. order_events at 38% dead tuples is causing the slow COUNT query — the sequential scan is reading through 1.84M dead rows. orders at 23% dead tuples is contributing to the slow customer lookup. Autovacuum is running but not keeping up. Claude should recommend manual VACUUM ANALYZE on audit_log and order_events immediately, and investigate autovacuum cost settings.
